name: The VR Center
about: The VR Center, founded in 2016, is a multi-sport simulation venue featuring Foresight golf simulators alongside a wide array of virtual reality experiences. They provide access to top-notch virtual courses and gaming experiences for golfers, while also offering activities like racing, flying, shooting, and running. The venue operates on a per-bay-hour pricing model and is suitable for individual practice, groups, and corporate events. Their offerings extend beyond golf to include STEM programs, esports facilities, and party packages, making it a versatile entertainment and training space.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Foresight golf simulator technology for realistic course play
Option to purchase memberships for discounted weekly playtime
Multi-bay availability suitable for solo practice or groups
Venue hosts tournaments and events for competitive play

food_and_drink.notes: On-site food menu available; pizzas included in party packages; no outside food or drink allowed
No mention of alcohol service available on premises

simulator_hardware.notes: Triple-screen golf bays with launch monitor

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not mention club rentals, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drink is allowed on the premises.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the duration for playing 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, kids can play in the golf bays with adult supervision, and the venue offers birthday party packages suitable for children.
